title: Google Reveals the Top Trending TV Shows of 2023
text: Google released its annual ranking of the most-searched television series in 2023. The list features five standout shows that captured viewer attention throughout the year. The Last of Us on Max ranked first, a post-apocalyptic drama adapted from a video game where a smuggler is tasked with escorting a 14-year-old girl named Ellie across a desolate United States, starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey. Ginny & Georgia on Netflix ranked second, a drama centered on a mother and daughter navigating life's challenges as Georgia settles into a small town after years on the run. Queen Charlotte: A Bridgerton Story on Netflix ranked third, a Bridgerton spin-off that explores young Queen Charlotte's origin story. Daisy Jones & The Six on Prime Video ranked fourth, adapted from a novel loosely inspired by Fleetwood Mac. Wednesday on Netflix ranked fifth, starring Jenna Ortega as Wednesday Addams, who uncovers mysterious campus murders at her new school.
